creator: ian@FreeBSD.org
text: I just made a series of commits to use the new usb fdt support routines, and to ensure the fdt data overrides eeprom/otp data when both are present.  (It was done as a series instead of one big commit so that it will be possible to bisect if something goes wrong, and also to make each incremental change more clear, instead of having one huge change-everything commit).  Unfortunately, I forgot to cite the PR number so none of the commits got added to the audit trail here.  The revisions were r348013, r348016, r348018, r348020.
